scripts.dev:watch: npm run css:watch & npm run cljs:watch
scripts.perf:lighthouse:login: sh -c 'test -n "$CHROME_PATH" || { echo "Set CHROME_PATH to Linux Chrome (see docs/informacao/performance/metodologia.md)"; exit 1; }; npx lighthouse "http://localhost:3000/" --chrome-path="$CHROME_PATH" --chrome-flags="--headless=new --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-dev-shm-usage" --only-categories=performance --output=json --output-path=./docs/perf-output/lighthouse-login.json --quiet'
scripts.perf:bundle-report: sh -c 'mkdir -p target && npx shadow-cljs release app --config-merge "{:builds {:app {:release {:bundle-report \"target/shadow-bundle-report.html\"}}}}"'
